sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
2. cause for which one is worthy of punishment; crime of which one is accused

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From the same as G154; a cause (as if asked for), that is, (logical) reason (motive, matter), (legal) crime (alleged or proved): - accusation, case, cause, crime, fault, [wh-]ere[-fore].
